name: Level Tank
short_description: Blast your way through the endless swarm of enemies and live for as long as possible in this fast-paced, top-down shooter. Upgrade your tank, collect power-ups, and activate abilities to help you survive on a variety of maps in various game modes. How long will you last before meeting your demise?
detailed_description:
Blast your way through the endless swarm of enemies and live for as long as possible in this fast-paced, top-down shooter. Upgrade your tank, collect power-ups, and activate abilities to help you survive on a variety of maps in various game modes.

MAPS & GAME MODES:

Explore 20+ maps while surviving in 27 different game modes.

3 standard game modes: Endless, Waves, and Adventure

24 unlockable challenge modes

Each game mode can be played on 5 difficulty levels suited for players of all skill levels.

UPGRADES & ENEMIES:

Upgrade your tank throughout each run to become stronger while fighting off the never-ending horde of randomly selected enemies and bosses.

Enemies become increasingly difficulty as you survive for longer and more enemy types will begin to appear.

CLASSES & ABILITIES:

Select a class to suit your playstyle and equip a special ability to help you escape dangerous situations.

PROGRESSION & CUSTOMIZATION:

Level up by gaining XP after each run to unlock new classes, abilities, maps, game modes, cosmetics, and other epic rewards.

Customize your tank by choosing your preferred color combination and select from 50 various skins.

Progress through the skill trees to unlock skills that will permanently increase your strength and unlock new capabilities.

LEADERBOARDS & ACHIEVEMENTS:

Survive for as long as possible and see how your high scores compare with other players on countless global leaderboards.

Attempt to complete over 100 achievements for extra rewards. Will you complete them all?
